benefits.description: First 10mg bottle worked amazing at 2mg/week for 5 weeks; replacement 20mg bottle also worked well after discarding a degraded vial.

side_effects.description: Started getting really hungry after week 5 of a 20mg bottle, suggesting peptide degradation; hunger resolved after switching to a new vial.

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg/week. Used a 10mg vial for 5 weeks successfully. Then bought a 20mg vial; after week 5 experienced increased hunger and suspected degradation, discarded remaining half of vial and replaced it. Notes reconstituted Reta stability around 5 weeks based on personal experience (initially heard 1 month, revised to ~5 weeks).
